productDisplayName: Nike Women Cruiser Hurley Dot Pink T-shirt
description: CompositionPink T-shirt for women made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, has a round ribbed neckline, short sleeves, stitch detailing on the shoulders with graphic print on the front, nike swoosh on the left sleeve and a curved hemFitSlimWash careMachine wash cold at 30 degrees with like coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanLine dryWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsThis T-shirt from nike is perfect for your running sessions. Engineered with Dri-Fit technology that wicks away sweat even on the hottest of days, it's sure to give you exemplary comfort and become your favourite running tee. Pair it with track pants and running shoes.
